claims.summary: Fixed sigmoid steepness and the recovery handover could create an abrupt semantic-retention transition.

claims.summary: The handover should have no greater-than-one-second jump and full contextual pressure must remain capped at 2.05.

claims.summary: Mathematical smoothness should be compared with lived packet retention and shadow decay across the handover.
claims.disposition: Routed a bounded trace using existing retention-review fields and temporal association only.

claims.summary: Sigmoid steepness, stale windows, or contextual-retention weighting should change to preserve complex narrative longer.
